source: Principia Symbolica Book 1 + reflexive-validation and framing appendices

entries.note: Only the monotone-nesting content of the level sets P_lambda is modeled, via the InLevel threshold predicate. The underlying space S, End(S), and the operator norm are not modeled.

Models the algebraic form H + (1/2)*drift^2 + (epsO/2)*refl^2 directly on reals and proves nonnegativity conditional on H >= 0, epsO >= 0. The kappa-norm and symbolic-manifold structure underlying drift/refl are erased to bare reals.

The per-step contraction law is kept as a structure field on an abstract energy : Nat -> Real sequence; its telescoped/accumulated form over n steps is proved by induction, mirroring Book8's metabolic-sufficiency pattern. H_symb and the underlying SRV dynamics are not modeled.

Does not construct the observer metric d_O or prove literal Cauchy-ness of the trajectory. Instead proves the quantitative content the Cauchy claim depends on: given a lower bound on energy, the cumulative and individual squared-drift terms stay uniformly bounded across all steps. This is a genuinely weaker, honest substitute, not a full proof of the stated theorem.

Models only the scalar bound expression C_chart * sqrt(lambda) and proves it is nonnegative and monotone nondecreasing in lambda. The operator-norm sup over the actual charts D chi_lambda is not modeled.

Structure recording the triple shape (context depth Nctx, an Nctx-indexed family of state transformations, resolution threshold epsilon); no additional law is asserted beyond the shape itself, matching the source's own caveat that this alone does not establish diachronic observerhood.

Erases the manifold/linear-algebra content (the residual map, its derivative J_x, tangent spaces, the curvature correction) and keeps only its abstract order-theoretic core: enlarging a feasible real-valued constraint set can only lower sInf, and strictly lowers it exactly when the enlarged set contains a witness below the old infimum -- the honest kernel of 'a new parameter relieves the obstruction precisely when it contributes a non-redundant direction.'

Proof by negation over the minimal frame: just-is and everything both collapse observationally into nothing; nothing dies by exhibition of the negotiation (non-null, selecting, positive-floor); uniqueness signed by the descent arrow (no return past work). Conditional on the minimal frame; the metaphysical scope of the three-word axiom is not exhausted.
re-read over FracturedAtlas's ChartComplex rather than constructed from an encode/matrix pair; the specific R^{d_lambda} coordinatization is not modeled, only chart-consistency.
"the metric completion exists" is re-read as "a single global metric consistent with every chart exists" via single_geometry_iff_glued, given PairCovers and Glued; separability is not modeled.
only chart-compatibility (existence of a consistent global metric) is modeled; the smooth-manifold structure itself is not.
the converse/obstruction direction: charts that are not glued admit no consistent global metric. Smoothness, second-countability, and paracompactness are not modeled.
"smooth structure arises... under bounded observer resolution" is re-read as its failure mode: resolution that is not consistent across charts (not Glued) yields no single global metric.
